name: vibe-lingual
description: Localize your app's UI without corrupting its logic. Scans every user-facing string by kind (JSX text, placeholder, aria-label, title, alt, toast, locale-sensitive date) and emits a six-block readiness brief; audits the stack for the gotchas that bite i18n retrofits (firebase-admin in SSR, structural-vs-presentational Intl, the timeZone decision, RTL surfaces, dynamic-route guard globs); then runs a confidence-routed extract -> wire -> translate -> guard loop that mutates only with per-file backups and idempotent re-runs. Deep on next-intl + App Router (cookie-driven locale, catalog parity guard, jsx-no-literals ratchet, ESM jest patch), with a real adapter seam that reports an honest not-yet-implemented for the rest instead of mishandling them. Validated against Celestia3.
